_comment: Custom threat-feed in RInfra's native Advisory schema ('our data style').
Point a source at this file or a URL that serves the same shape:
A top-level array is also accepted (drop the { "advisories": ... } wrapper).
Per advisory: id, title, summary are the essentials. 'source' defaults to the
feed label, and 'suggestedTtps' is auto-derived from the title+summary keyword
heuristic when omitted — so you only hand-map ATT&CK when you want to override it.
Fields prefixed with _ are ignored by the parser.

advisories.title: Exploited deserialization in internal billing portal
advisories.summary: Active exploitation of an insecure deserialization endpoint enabling remote code execution against the billing portal.

advisories.title: Authentication bypass in EdgeProxy appliance
advisories.summary: An authentication bypass allows unauthenticated access to the management console.
